reviews.review_description: I think it’s very good but you need to to add a urus and a bmw

Give this a rating. Are you kidding? This app easily is worth a thousand stars out of five. I could spend years saying how good this app is and it would not be enough. The usual glowing accolades, Sterling, platinum, profound, Dom Perignon, stellar levels of intense excellence. A gift from God.

Enless Overtake brings to mind the Android tablet highway rscing apps with similar eponymous titles such as Highway Racer, Highway Driver, Traffic Racer, Traffic Driver, Traffic Rider, Highway Rider. I loved those Android highway driving apps. Very therapeutic.
This is the VR app I've waited for ever since I've discovered VR. There are other similar motorcycle and race car VR highway apps but none at the level of Endless Overtake.
Endless Overtake should win an Oscar in the best highway race car VR app for 2025.


Endless Overtake has a smoothness and is just like the old Android tablet highway race car driver apps. Straight highway is good. Too many curves leads to motion sickness. There is very little to no motion sickness in this app. 
The scenes repeat real fast just like in some of the Android race car apps. Some were more repetitive than others. Like a GIF.

reviews.review_title: Awesome old school driving game in VR
reviews.review_description: I absolutely love this game and for the price, you can’t go wrong. This is a truly fun experience. I’m always looking for games to play while listening to music or podcasts and this is perfect for that. It’s a VR take on old-school classic retro racing games such as OutRun. You can play in either cockpit view or overhead view and both views have their advantages depending on which game you’re playing. You can either play four lanes all going in one direction or two lanes going in each direction. The premise is as simple as  weaving through traffic while trying not to hit any other vehicle vehicles. ￼￼ Simple gameplay and super fun. Buy it before the price goes up. ￼
I just got the game today and it is so fun.. the amount of different upgrades you can do is quite intriguing, the car choices are quite slim but good and the cutting up in traffic never gets old...

This game is only $8 but is well worth more.  (at the time I wrote this) The many different ways to play, different cars, locations and extras was really fun.  You drive your car as fast and as far as you can in traffic, crossing lines and even going the wrong way in a one way.  Try not to crash!  I can't wait to see what they add next to the game. Buy it now before the price goes up.

Quite a promising urban racing simulator, there is potential, so far only driving in a straight line, but I hope the developers will add more harder tracks
car tuning looks qualitative, graphics settings can also be adapted

After playing for a while I can say it’s a well executed game. However there are a few things that could be worked on. 

For one the cockpit mode is brilliant, but feel when using your hands to steer the response time is just not enough to steer the vehicle in time to dodge vehicles therefore only option is to steer using the thumb sticks. 

I’d love to see some checkpoints in the game ideally in the time mode where if you hit a checkpoint you get a bonus, and then get added time to continue and see how much further you can go! 

Love all the upgrades that can be obtained to build up your car and gives great replay ability 

Great work with a few tweaks and some added features in the racing this will be even more awesome! 

Great priced game with stacks of content! Leaderboard chasers will love this game. 

More future locations would be awesome as can see people switching off after a while due to lack of environments. 

Some kind of multiplayer mode in this would also be awesome.

All said and done…

Great job well done devs!
This is a really cool game but we definitely need more cars and locations please. Also a motorcycle option might be tight. Love your games and keep m coming 🤌🔥
10/10 game for 8 dollars this game is crazy they should add more maps but this game is the cheapest one and the best one
Fun motorway swimming, good physics, car setups and upgrades
THIS GAME IS SO DAM AMAZING AND FUN I HAVE PLAYED IT OVER 6 HOURS WITH OUT STOPING THE GAME THIS GAME IS AMAZING FOR ITS PRICE THE ONLY THING IT NEEDS TO BE A 10/10 IS MULTILAYER
